block_00: How to dip your toes into trading, safely.
block_01: We know how intimidating the platform may seem, especially considering the risks trading carries. But the truth is there are ways to get into trading safely.
block_03: Some people like to learn by doing, while others learn by watching. If you’re the type that would rather observe first, check out the video tutorials we’ve prepared for traders.
block_06: Another safe option to get acquainted with a trading instrument is to use a Practice Account. You’re not risking any real investments, but get infinite opportunities to experiment with a replenishable $10,000 balance.
block_09: Make sure you don’t rush into things by going “all in” with your funds. A rule of thumb many experienced traders stick to is to never invest more than 2% of their balance at any given time. You can find more tips on the IQ Option Blog.
block_11: And remember: slow and steady wins the race. Spending an adequate amount of time on market research, analysis and strategy testing will give you a huge advantage.
block_12: Over the next few days, we’d like to share some trading tips and show you around the trading platform. In the meantime, why not get a feel for the platform by trading on your demo account?
